_comment: Copy this file to dm_config.json and fill in your settings. dm_config.json is gitignored.

ollama.description: Free, runs locally. Requires Ollama installed and running (ollama serve).
setup: 1. Install Ollama: https://ollama.com  (or: winget install Ollama.Ollama)
2. Pull a model:   ollama pull llama3.1
3. Set backend to 'ollama' and model to 'llama3.1' (or whichever you pulled)

gemini.description: Free tier (1500 requests/day). Requires a Google account and API key.
setup: 1. Go to https://aistudio.google.com and sign in with your Google account
2. Click 'Get API key' and create a new key (free, no credit card needed)
3. Set backend to 'gemini' and paste your key in api_key
OR set the GEMINI_API_KEY environment variable instead
